workflow_steps.name: scroll_to_candidate_activity
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down until the Candidate Activity section is visible

workflow_steps.name: click_registration_link
workflow_steps.description: Click the CUET registration link under Candidate Activity
workflow_steps.prompt: Click the bullet point link under the 'Candidate Activity' heading that starts with 'Re-opening of Registration'

workflow_steps.name: click_new_registration
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down then click 'New Registration' button in the center card
workflow_steps.prompt: In the center card (middle of the three boxes), click the blue button at the bottom that says 'New Registration >>'

workflow_steps.name: scroll_to_declaration
workflow_steps.description: Scroll down to the declaration checkbox on the instructions page

workflow_steps.name: accept_declaration
workflow_steps.target: I have downloaded the Information Bulletin of CUET (UG) 2026

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Day
fields.prompt: In the 'Candidate's Date of Birth' row, click the first dropdown labeled '--Day--' and select the day '{value}'

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Month
fields.prompt: In the 'Candidate's Date of Birth' row, click the second dropdown labeled '--Month--' and select '{value}'

fields.label: Candidate's Date of Birth Year
fields.prompt: In the 'Candidate's Date of Birth' row, click the third dropdown labeled '--Year--' and select '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: fill_confirm_personal_details
workflow_steps.description: Fill Confirm Personal Details section (re-enter same values)

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Day
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Date of Birth' row (under 'Confirm Personal Details'), click the first dropdown labeled '--Day--' and select the day '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Month
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Date of Birth' row (under 'Confirm Personal Details'), click the second dropdown labeled '--Month--' and select '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Date of Birth Year
fields.prompt: In the 'Confirm Date of Birth' row (under 'Confirm Personal Details'), click the third dropdown labeled '--Year--' and select '{value}'

fields.label: Premises No/ Name
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', find the input next to 'Premises No/ Name' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Locality
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', find the input next to 'Locality' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Country
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', click the 'Country' dropdown and select 'India'

fields.label: State
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', click the 'State' dropdown and select '{value}'

fields.label: District
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', click the 'District' dropdown and select '{value}'

fields.label: PIN Code
fields.prompt: Under 'Present Address', find the input next to 'PIN Code' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.prompt: Find the larger input field next to 'Mobile Number' (the one after the small country code box) and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Mobile Number
fields.prompt: Find the larger input field next to 'Confirm Mobile Number' (the one after the small country code box) and type '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: same_as_present_address
workflow_steps.description: Check 'Same As Present Address' for permanent address

workflow_steps.name: fill_password_section
workflow_steps.description: Fill Password, Security Question and Security Answer

fields.label: Password
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Password' (under 'Choose Password') and type '{value}'

fields.label: Confirm Password
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Confirm Password' and type '{value}'

fields.label: Security Question
fields.prompt: Click the 'Security Question' dropdown and select the first available option (not the default '--Select--')

fields.label: Security Answer
fields.prompt: Find the input field next to 'Security Answer' and type '{value}'

workflow_steps.name: solve_captcha
workflow_steps.description: Read the CAPTCHA image and fill it in

error_handlers.already registered: stop:This email/phone is already registered on CUET portal

workflow_steps.name: portal_account_review_agree
workflow_steps.description: On Portal Account Details page, tick the 'I Agree' declaration checkbox

workflow_steps.name: submit_and_send_otp
workflow_steps.description: Click 'Submit and send OTP to verify Mobile Number'
workflow_steps.target: Submit and send OTP to verify Mobile Number

workflow_steps.name: handle_otp
workflow_steps.wait_reason: Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number and email for CUET UG verification
